option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.text.*?>
<AnchorPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="ChatApp.ChatAppController" prefHeight="600.0" prefWidth="800.0">
<!-- Connection Panel --> <VBox fx:id="connectPanel" spacing="15" alignment="CENTER" style="-fx-padding: 30;" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0"> <Label text="Trò Chuyện Với Protocol Buffers" style="-fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
<VBox spacing="10" style="-fx-border-color: #cccccc; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-padding: 20;" maxWidth="400"> <Label text="Kết Nối Đến Server" style="-fx-font-size: 16; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
<VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Tên người dùng:"/> <TextField fx:id="txtUsername" promptText="Nhập tên người dùng"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Địa chỉ Server:"/> <TextField fx:id="txtServerHost" promptText="localhost"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Cổng:"/> <TextField fx:id="txtServerPort" promptText="4444"/> </VBox>
<Button fx:id="btnConnect" text="Kết Nối" style="-fx-padding: 10; -fx-font-size: 14;"/> <Label fx:id="lblStatus" text="Chưa kết nối" style="-fx-text-fill: #999999;"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<!-- Chat Panel --> <BorderPane fx:id="chatPanel" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0"> <top> <HBox spacing="10" style="-fx-padding: 10; -fx-background-color: #f0f0f0;" prefHeight="50"> <Label fx:id="lblClient" text=" User" style="-fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold;" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label fx:id="lblStatus" text="✅ Kết nối thành công" style="-fx-text-fill: #00aa00; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> </HBox> </top>
<center> <HBox spacing="10" style="-fx-padding: 10;"> <!-- Chat Area --> <VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" spacing="0"> <Label text=" Trò Chuyện" style="-fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold;" VBox.vgrow="NEVER"/> <ScrollPane fx:id="scrollPane" fitToWidth="true" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <VBox fx:id="chatArea" spacing="5" style="-fx-padding: 10;"/> </ScrollPane> </VBox>
<!-- User List Sidebar --> <VBox fx:id="userListContainer" spacing="5" style="-fx-border-color: #dddddd; -fx-border-width: 0 0 0 1; -fx-padding: 10;" prefWidth="150"> <Label text=" Người dùng" style="-fx-font-size: 12; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <ListView fx:id="userListView" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> </VBox> </HBox> </center>
<bottom> <VBox spacing="5" style="-fx-padding: 10; -fx-background-color: #f9f9f9;"> <HBox spacing="10" prefHeight="40"> <TextField fx:id="txtMessage" promptText="Nhập tin nhắn..." HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" style="-fx-padding: 8;"/> <Button fx:id="btnSend" text=" Gửi" style="-fx-padding: 8 20; -fx-font-size: 12;"/> </HBox> </VBox> </bottom> </BorderPane>
</AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.text.*?>
<AnchorPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="ChatApp.ChatAppController" prefHeight="600.0" prefWidth="800.0">
<!-- Connection Panel --> <VBox fx:id="connectPanel" spacing="15" alignment="CENTER" style="-fx-padding: 30;" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0"> <Label text="Trò Chuyện Với Protocol Buffers" style="-fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
<VBox spacing="10" style="-fx-border-color: #cccccc; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-padding: 20;" maxWidth="400"> <Label text="Kết Nối Đến Server" style="-fx-font-size: 16; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
<VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Tên người dùng:"/> <TextField fx:id="txtUsername" promptText="Nhập tên người dùng"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Địa chỉ Server:"/> <TextField fx:id="txtServerHost" promptText="localhost"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Cổng:"/> <TextField fx:id="txtServerPort" promptText="4444"/> </VBox>
<Button fx:id="btnConnect" text="Kết Nối" style="-fx-padding: 10; -fx-font-size: 14;"/> <Label fx:id="lblConnectStatus" text="Chưa kết nối" style="-fx-text-fill: #999999;"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<!-- Chat Panel --> <BorderPane fx:id="chatPanel" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0"> <top> <HBox spacing="10" style="-fx-padding: 10; -fx-background-color: #f0f0f0;" prefHeight="50"> <Label fx:id="lblClient" text=" User" style="-fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold;" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label fx:id="lblChatStatus" text="✅ Kết nối thành công" style="-fx-text-fill: #00aa00; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> </HBox> </top>
<center> <HBox spacing="10" style="-fx-padding: 10;"> <!-- Chat Area --> <VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" spacing="0"> <Label text=" Trò Chuyện" style="-fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold;" VBox.vgrow="NEVER"/> <ScrollPane fx:id="scrollPane" fitToWidth="true" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <VBox fx:id="chatArea" spacing="5" style="-fx-padding: 10;"/> </ScrollPane> </VBox>
<!-- User List Sidebar --> <VBox fx:id="userListContainer" spacing="5" style="-fx-border-color: #dddddd; -fx-border-width: 0 0 0 1; -fx-padding: 10;" prefWidth="150"> <Label text=" Người dùng" style="-fx-font-size: 12; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <ListView fx:id="userListView" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> </VBox> </HBox> </center>
<bottom> <VBox spacing="5" style="-fx-padding: 10; -fx-background-color: #f9f9f9;"> <HBox spacing="10" prefHeight="40"> <TextField fx:id="txtMessage" promptText="Nhập tin nhắn..." HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" style="-fx-padding: 8;"/> <Button fx:id="btnImage" text="️" style="-fx-padding: 8; -fx-font-size: 14;"/> <Button fx:id="btnFile" text="" style="-fx-padding: 8; -fx-font-size: 14;"/> <Button fx:id="btnVoice" text="" style="-fx-padding: 8; -fx-font-size: 14;"/> <Button fx:id="btnSend" text=" Gửi" style="-fx-padding: 8 20; -fx-font-size: 12;"/> </HBox> </VBox> </bottom> </BorderPane>
</AnchorPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.text.*?>
<AnchorPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="ChatApp.ChatAppController" prefHeight="600.0" prefWidth="800.0">
<!-- Connection Panel --> <VBox fx:id="connectPanel" spacing="15" alignment="CENTER" style="-fx-padding: 30;" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0"> <Label text="Trò Chuyện Với Protocol Buffers" style="-fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
<VBox spacing="10" style="-fx-border-color: #cccccc; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-padding: 20;" maxWidth="400"> <Label text="Kết Nối Đến Server" style="-fx-font-size: 16; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
<VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Tên người dùng:"/> <TextField fx:id="txtUsername" promptText="Nhập tên người dùng"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Địa chỉ Server:"/> <TextField fx:id="txtServerHost" promptText="localhost"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Cổng:"/> <TextField fx:id="txtServerPort" promptText="4444"/> </VBox>
<Button fx:id="btnConnect" text="Kết Nối" style="-fx-padding: 10; -fx-font-size: 14;"/> <Label fx:id="lblStatus" text="Chưa kết nối" style="-fx-text-fill: #999999;"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<!-- Chat Panel --> <BorderPane fx:id="chatPanel" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0"> <top> <HBox spacing="10" style="-fx-padding: 10; -fx-background-color: #f0f0f0;" prefHeight="50"> <Label fx:id="lblClient" text=" User" style="-fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold;" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label fx:id="lblStatus" text="✅ Kết nối thành công" style="-fx-text-fill: #00aa00; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> </HBox> </top>
<center> <HBox spacing="10" style="-fx-padding: 10;"> <!-- Chat Area --> <VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" spacing="0"> <Label text=" Trò Chuyện" style="-fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold;" VBox.vgrow="NEVER"/> <ScrollPane fx:id="scrollPane" fitToWidth="true" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <VBox fx:id="chatArea" spacing="5" style="-fx-padding: 10;"/> </ScrollPane> </VBox>
<!-- User List Sidebar --> <VBox fx:id="userListContainer" spacing="5" style="-fx-border-color: #dddddd; -fx-border-width: 0 0 0 1; -fx-padding: 10;" prefWidth="150"> <Label text=" Người dùng" style="-fx-font-size: 12; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <ListView fx:id="userListView" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> </VBox> </HBox> </center>
<bottom> <VBox spacing="5" style="-fx-padding: 10; -fx-background-color: #f9f9f9;"> <HBox spacing="10" prefHeight="40"> <TextField fx:id="txtMessage" promptText="Nhập tin nhắn..." HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" style="-fx-padding: 8;"/> <Button fx:id="btnImage" text="️" style="-fx-padding: 8; -fx-font-size: 14;"/> <Button fx:id="btnFile" text="" style="-fx-padding: 8; -fx-font-size: 14;"/> <Button fx:id="btnSend" text=" Gửi" style="-fx-padding: 8 20; -fx-font-size: 12;"/> </HBox> </VBox> </bottom> </BorderPane>
</AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.text.*?>
<AnchorPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="ChatApp.ChatAppController" prefHeight="600.0" prefWidth="800.0">
<!-- Connection Panel --> <VBox fx:id="connectPanel" spacing="15" alignment="CENTER" style="-fx-padding: 30;" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0"> <Label text="Trò Chuyện Với Protocol Buffers" style="-fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
<VBox spacing="10" style="-fx-border-color: #cccccc; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-padding: 20;" maxWidth="400"> <Label text="Kết Nối Đến Server" style="-fx-font-size: 16; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
<VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Tên người dùng:"/> <TextField fx:id="txtUsername" promptText="Nhập tên người dùng"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Địa chỉ Server:"/> <TextField fx:id="txtServerHost" promptText="localhost"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Cổng:"/> <TextField fx:id="txtServerPort" promptText="4444"/> </VBox>
<Button fx:id="btnConnect" text="Kết Nối" style="-fx-padding: 10; -fx-font-size: 14;"/> <Label fx:id="lblConnectStatus" text="Chưa kết nối" style="-fx-text-fill: #999999;"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<!-- Chat Panel --> <BorderPane fx:id="chatPanel" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0"> <top> <HBox spacing="10" style="-fx-padding: 10; -fx-background-color: #f0f0f0;" prefHeight="50"> <Label fx:id="lblClient" text=" User" style="-fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold;" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label fx:id="lblChatStatus" text="✅ Kết nối thành công" style="-fx-text-fill: #00aa00; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> </HBox> </top>
<center> <HBox spacing="10" style="-fx-padding: 10;"> <!-- Chat Area --> <VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" spacing="0"> <Label text=" Trò Chuyện" style="-fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold;" VBox.vgrow="NEVER"/> <ScrollPane fx:id="scrollPane" fitToWidth="true" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <VBox fx:id="chatArea" spacing="5" style="-fx-padding: 10;"/> </ScrollPane> </VBox>
<!-- User List Sidebar --> <VBox fx:id="userListContainer" spacing="5" style="-fx-border-color: #dddddd; -fx-border-width: 0 0 0 1; -fx-padding: 10;" prefWidth="150"> <Label text=" Người dùng" style="-fx-font-size: 12; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <ListView fx:id="userListView" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> </VBox> </HBox> </center>
<bottom> <VBox spacing="5" style="-fx-padding: 10; -fx-background-color: #f9f9f9;"> <HBox spacing="10" prefHeight="40"> <TextField fx:id="txtMessage" promptText="Nhập tin nhắn..." HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" style="-fx-padding: 8;"/> <Button fx:id="btnImage" text="️" style="-fx-padding: 8; -fx-font-size: 14;"/> <Button fx:id="btnFile" text="" style="-fx-padding: 8; -fx-font-size: 14;"/> <Button fx:id="btnVoice" text="" style="-fx-padding: 8; -fx-font-size: 14;"/> <Button fx:id="btnSend" text=" Gửi" style="-fx-padding: 8 20; -fx-font-size: 12;"/> </HBox> </VBox> </bottom> </BorderPane>
</AnchorPane>
